name: llm-gtd
description: LLM-GTD is a portable GTD trusted system for Codex that keeps commitments in plain Markdown lists.

interface.shortDescription: Run a GTD trusted system from plain Markdown lists.
interface.longDescription: LLM-GTD helps Codex capture, clarify, update, organize, engage, and review commitments in a durable plain-Markdown GTD system. It initializes GTD lists under memory/gtd/, treats progress reports as state updates instead of new inbox items, and uses a calendar provider only when an existing integration is available.
defaultPrompt: Set up my GTD trusted system
